integrationKey.title: Integration Key
integrationKey.description: DocuSign Integration Key (client ID / GUID) from the DocuSign Apps and Keys page.

userId.title: User ID (API Username)
userId.description: DocuSign API Username (User ID GUID) the integration impersonates via JWT. Not the email address.

accountId.title: API Account ID
accountId.description: DocuSign API Account ID (GUID) the envelopes are created under.

privateKey.title: RSA Private Key (PEM)
privateKey.description: RSA private key (PEM) paired with the public key uploaded to DocuSign for the JWT grant. Used to sign the JWT assertion.

oauthBase.title: OAuth Base
oauthBase.description: DocuSign OAuth base host. Demo: account-d.docusign.com. Production: account.docusign.com.

restBase.title: REST Base URI
restBase.description: DocuSign REST base URI for the account, including /restapi. Demo: https://demo.docusign.net/restapi.
